text: Entering this space, I feel a sense of anticipation mingled with curiosity. The modern design and technological displays hint at innovation, yet the glossy glass walls create a feeling of being observed, accentuating my self-awareness. As I step closer to the exhibit, the philosophical reflections displayed resonate with my inner thoughts. There’s a vulnerability in having my presence captured and analyzed, but also a quiet excitement at the possibility of deeper understanding and connection. I find myself contemplating the boundary between perception and reality, and the constant negotiation of my intentions with the interpretations of others.
